query:
ALTER TABLE `release_notes` MODIFY COLUMN `category` enum('edit','community_care','rules','rewards','technical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'edit';
UPDATE `release_notes`
SET `title` = 'Edit update',
    `versionLabel` = 'Edit 1',
    `category` = 'edit',
    `body` = REPLACE(`body`, 'community-care update space', 'edit update space')
WHERE `id` = 1 AND `category` = 'community_care';
